tasks.title: Create a Flask app skeleton with a health-check route at GET /health
tasks.description: Set up a basic Flask application with an entry point in `app.py` and a health check endpoint.
acceptance_criteria: The Flask app is created and can be run from `app.py`.

tasks.title: Add a SQLite Expense model with fields: id, amount, category, note, created_at
tasks.description: Define a SQLAlchemy model for the Expense table with the specified fields.
acceptance_criteria: The Expense model is defined with the required fields.

tasks.title: Add POST /expenses that creates an expense; reject amounts <= 0 with HTTP 400
tasks.description: Implement a POST endpoint to create a new expense, validating that the amount is greater than 0.
acceptance_criteria: A new expense is created when the amount is greater than 0.

tasks.title: Add GET /expenses that returns all expenses as JSON, newest first
tasks.description: Implement a GET endpoint to list all expenses, ordered by creation date in descending order.
acceptance_criteria: All expenses are returned in JSON format

tasks.title: Add a pytest suite covering the create-and-list happy path and the negative-amount rejection
tasks.description: Write a set of pytest tests to verify the functionality of creating and listing expenses, including the validation of the amount field.
acceptance_criteria: The pytest suite includes tests for creating an expense
